description: P3 canary: first vault-backed FxSwapHook + SharedFxVault on Arc. Reserve custody lives in the shared vault; the hook JIT-pulls fills. Coexists with the legacy self-custody EURC pool (0xC6F894) which still holds the bulk liquidity until the migration scale-up.
timelockNote: CANARY: admin == timelock == KEEPER (testnet, no upgrade delay). Mainnet MUST use a real TimelockController for UPGRADER_ROLE.

morphoMarket.note: M2_USDC_EURC, live USDC-loan market. Senior rehyp wired but UNUSED for the canary (junior-only).

migration.note: Legacy self-custody EURC pool fully redeemed (KEEPER owned ~100% of shares) and migrated into the vault junior buffer. Residual is the burned MINIMUM_LIQUIDITY claim. Legacy hook 0xC6F894 retired. quote(1000 USDC->EURC)=854.54 EURC ~= oracle mid - 30bps spread.

notes: Settlement: input take→vault, output vault.fundFill→PoolManager + sync/settle; afterSwap recordInflow. Vault prices FX-out notional via oracle. Adversarial-cleared (Codex): v4 deltas correct, cap reverts atomic. PENDING before multi-pool/lender deposits: per-poolId reserve allocation, timelock allowHook, full migration of the legacy 0xC6F894 pool (redeem ~10k USDC + 9k EURC → fundJunior). Swaps need a router (FxV4RouterHarness) on-chain; local swap-sim test already proves the path.
